summary: Decompiled the lbvector library by replacing asm/melee/lb/lbvector.s with src/melee/lb/lbvector.c and wiring the new C object into obj_files.mk. The PR also renamed many existing assembly callsites from anonymous func_8000Dxxx-style labels to meaningful lbvector_* and sqrtf__Ff symbols, added math/GX/MTX declarations needed by the new C, and adjusted build flags specifically for lbvector.o. The author noted the new attempt got a much higher match rate, but epilogue scheduling issues remained.
what_changed: Removed the old 1881-line asm/melee/lb/lbvector.s implementation and added a 509-line C implementation at src/melee/lb/lbvector.c.
Changed obj_files.mk so lbvector is built from $(BUILD_DIR)/src/melee/lb/lbvector.o instead of the old assembly object.

Implemented core vector helpers in C, including lbvector_normalize, lbvector_normalize_xy, lbvector_add, lbvector_add_xy, lbvector_sub, lbvector_diff, lbvector_crossprod_normalized, and lbvector_rotate.

Kept several not-yet-meaningfully-named functions in the decompiled C under address-style names such as func_8000D620, func_8000D790, func_8000D8F4, func_8000DE38, func_8000DF0C, func_8000E210, func_8000E530, and func_8000E838.
Added an inline sqrtf implementation to include/math.h using __frsqrte Newton iterations and a local sqrtf_accurate helper in lbvector.c with one extra iteration for some XY-length paths.
Added Dolphin SDK-style declarations for GXProject, C_MTXOrtho, C_MTXPerspective, and PSVECCrossProduct, plus VecPtr, Point3d, Point3dPtr, S16Vec, QuaternionPtr, Qtrn, and QtrnPtr type aliases.

Renamed many assembly callsites across fighters, stages, items, baselib, and lb files from anonymous labels like func_8000D2EC, func_8000D46C, func_8000D4F8, func_8000D5BC, and func_8000DB00 to lbvector_normalize, lbvector_add, lbvector_diff, sqrtf__Ff, and lbvector_rotate.
Renamed the assembly symbol func_80341148 in asm/dolphin/gx/GXFifo.s to GXProject.

Changed Makefile defaults and flags: added GENERATE_MAP ?= 1, bumped MWCC_VERSION from 1.0 to 1.1, made map generation conditional, removed -msgstyle gcc from CFLAGS, and added per-object flags for lbvector.o: -inline auto -fp_contract on.
smart_moves: Used a per-object CFLAGS override only for lbvector.o, avoiding a global compiler-flag change while still matching this difficult translation unit with -inline auto and -fp_contract on.
Preserved unknown function names where semantics were not fully established, while renaming high-confidence helper routines to descriptive lbvector_* names.
Propagated meaningful symbol names back into existing assembly callsites, making later decompilation of unrelated modules easier because calls now document vector operations directly.

Matched SDK-style math behavior by providing an inline sqrtf using __frsqrte and Newton refinement, then introduced sqrtf_accurate only where the lbvector code apparently needed a different precision/scheduling profile.
Introduced minimal Dolphin headers and type aliases needed by the decompiled file rather than embedding all prototypes locally in lbvector.c.
Used a dummy function in lbvector.c, explicitly commented as needed to force float ordering in .sdata2, indicating attention to constant pool/data ordering as part of matching.
decomp_lessons: For math-heavy library files, matching can require exact compiler version and local flags; this PR used MWCC_VERSION 1.1 plus lbvector-specific -inline auto and -fp_contract on.
Do not assume one sqrt implementation is enough: this slice shows both a standard inline sqrtf and an extra-iteration sqrtf_accurate used for particular length/normalize paths.
Renaming old assembly callsites after decompiling a shared library has high downstream value because many modules call the same helpers.

SDK types and prototypes should be added to common headers when decompilation uncovers stable library interfaces such as GXProject, C_MTXPerspective, C_MTXOrtho, PSVECCrossProduct, VecPtr, and Point3d.
If a function's role is still uncertain, keeping address-style names in the C source is acceptable evidence-grounded practice; this PR did that for several func_8000Dxxx/func_8000Exxx routines.
Floating constants and sdata2 ordering can matter for matching; the explicit dummy function comment is a reusable warning for future decompilation work.

PR body evidence says the match rate improved but epilogue scheduling issues remained, so future work on similar files should expect final scheduling/prologue/epilogue cleanup even after functional C is close.
naming_conventions: High-confidence vector helpers use the lbvector_ prefix, for example lbvector_normalize, lbvector_normalize_xy, lbvector_add, lbvector_add_xy, lbvector_sub, lbvector_diff, lbvector_crossprod_normalized, and lbvector_rotate.
External SDK-like functions are named with their library prefixes/casing, such as GXProject, C_MTXOrtho, C_MTXPerspective, and PSVECCrossProduct.
The C++-mangled sqrt symbol appears in assembly as sqrtf__Ff after replacing anonymous func_8000D5BC callsites.
Unconfirmed routines remain address-based, such as func_8000D620, func_8000D790, func_8000D8F4, func_8000DE38, func_8000DF0C, func_8000E210, func_8000E530, and func_8000E838.
MTX type aliases follow Dolphin-style pointer typedefs: VecPtr, Point3dPtr, S16VecPtr, QuaternionPtr, and QtrnPtr.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used MWCC 1.1 instead of 1.0 for this PR's build.
Applied lbvector.o-specific compiler options: -inline auto and -fp_contract on.
Kept old_stack prologue postprocessing through PROCFLAGS, while the author still reported epilogue scheduling issues.
Changed CFLAGS by removing -msgstyle gcc, a build-level adjustment that may affect compiler output formatting/behavior in this historical setup.
Introduced GENERATE_MAP to make -map $(MAP) conditional, reducing map generation from an unconditional linker flag.
Added inline sqrtf in include/math.h under #pragma cplusplus on/reset, matching the apparent sqrtf__Ff call target used throughout assembly.
Used sqrtf_accurate with an extra Newton iteration for some lbvector calculations where the normal sqrtf inline was not sufficient.
Used a dummy function returning 2.0f to force float ordering in the .sdata2 section.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
Author note from the PR body: "Getting a much higher match rate this time. Epilogue scheduling issues remain."
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that resolve lbvector epilogue scheduling issues.
Search for later renames of func_8000D620, func_8000D790, func_8000D8F4, func_8000DE38, func_8000DF0C, func_8000E210, func_8000E530, and func_8000E838.
Find later changes to include/math.h sqrtf or sqrtf_accurate behavior.
Search for PRs that modify lbvector.o CFLAGS or MWCC_VERSION after this change.
Find later header organization changes for GXTransform.h, mtx.h, and mtxtypes.h.
